messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-512 — Recurring failure-mode audit: inventory what agents keep tripping on and emit a prioritized root-cause fix-ticket slate
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: agents keep re-hitting a set of failure modes (merge/phantom-revert races, stale-build
gotchas, dropped handoff notes, blocked-menu stalls, bounce-hygiene / inherited-stale-state
crashes). The human wants those errors reduced. But the modes are HETEROGENEOUS: many canonical
ones are alr…
Approval context: Draining your question "can we run a ticket to fix the recurring loose ends agents keep tripping on." You chose AUDIT-FIRST, so this ticket does the inventory, not the fixes: it produces (1) a reproducible scan that groups the structured failure evidence (rule proposals, QA bounces, bounce evidence…
BL-512 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-512" (or "reject BL-512 <reason>") to act.
